publishedAbstract: * VM In a Paused State * Only a Reboot can bring the VM Back Online * Frequent automatic client blocklisting * Ceph-RBD Volumes using `accessMode: RWX` with `ReclaimSpaceCronJobs` impacted (commonly Virtualization). ~~~ [12345678] Correlation ID: null, Call Stack: null, Custom Event ID:-1, Message: VM redhat-guest-vm-1 has been paused due to an unknown storage error. ~~~
publishedTitle: Virtual Machines (VMs) Backed by Openshift Data Foundation (ODF) Paused - "Transitioned guest vm-name-xx to paused state due to IO error" Caused by ReclaimSpaceCronJobs on Ceph-RBD RWX Volumes
